creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
If you fill up your squid cache, CPU will go to 100% but the cache
will not be cleaned up.  I ran into this on my local cache.  You can
find info here:

http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v2/2.3/bugs/#squid-2.3.stable3-storeExpiredReferenceAge

Fix: 

Apply referenced patch.
How-To-Repeat: Fill up your squid cache - cpu will max out.
